feature_sets.full: Lag, rolling, cyclical time, weekend, and station location features.
feature_sets.no_temporal: Full model without cyclical time and weekend features.
feature_sets.aqi_lag_only: Only AQI lag and rolling history.

model.interval_method: 90% residual-calibrated interval on the final 20% of each training split
model.crps_method: Gaussian CRPS using calibration residual standard deviation
